title: Gouda Crispy Ukrainian Cheese Pierogi
description: Rich and crispy pierogi filled with a creamy Gouda cheese and perfect for a Ukrainian-inspired dinner. This recipe uses a mortar and pestle to pound the dough to achieve the perfect texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, potato starch, and egg to make the dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Use a mortar and pestle to pound the dough for 2 minutes to achieve the perfect texture.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a thin circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of the Gouda cheese in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the cheese to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the pierogi hot with your favorite toppings, such as sour cream and chives.
